name: Research Summarizer
description: Reads PDFs, plain-text documents, and web pages. Returns concise summaries at lengths you specify (e.g., 'in 200 words'). Best for academic papers, long reports, and technical documentation.
example_queries: what's the TL;DR of this paper
I need to understand a long doc fast
boil this paper down for me
extract the main findings of a study
shorten this document to a page
explain a research paper in plain English
intended_use_cases: Academic researchers triaging a large reading list
Analysts who need a 200-word version of a 50-page report before a meeting
Engineers reading specs / RFCs and wanting the highlights

capabilities.name: summarize_document
capabilities.description: Take a document (PDF URL, text file, or web page URL) and return a concise summary at the specified length.

examples.output: This paper introduces a method for ...

examples.input: give me a one-paragraph summary of the attached PDF

capabilities.name: extract_citations
capabilities.description: Pull out the citation list from an academic paper and return structured records (title, authors, year, DOI if present).

examples.input: list all the references in https://arxiv.org/abs/2024.12345

capabilities.name: compare_papers
capabilities.description: Take two or more documents and return their points of agreement and disagreement.

examples.input: compare https://arxiv.org/abs/x and https://arxiv.org/abs/y on their methodology
examples.output: Paper X uses ... while paper Y uses ...
